name: Session Arcade
description: A launch-night helper for game sessions, cloud gaming, and quick console handoffs.
short_description: A launch-night helper for game sessions, cloud gaming, and quick console handoffs.
default_prompt: Use $session-arcade to build a polished macOS menu-bar utility for a launch-night helper for game sessions, cloud gaming, and quick console handoffs.
audience: People who launch and switch play sessions often
detail_lines: Keeps the next game or session within a few clicks.
Makes it easier to move from launcher to play mode.
Feels like a fun utility instead of a generic gaming dashboard.
